evals.prompt: Hay que migrar el módulo de auth de JWT a session tokens. Toca el middleware, los handlers de login/logout, los tests de integración y el CLAUDE.md.
evals.expected_output: The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks, picks a design lens, checks git status or mentions branching, uses TaskCreate, mentions committing per group, and closes with a Phase 3 quality review.
expectations: The agent divides work into lettered groups (A, B, C...) with numbered subtasks (A1, A2...)
The agent picks a design lens before dividing the work
The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate to register the subtasks
The agent mentions committing at group boundaries
The agent mentions Phase 3 quality review with simplify and clean-code

evals.prompt: Refactoriza el servicio de pagos para separar la validación del procesamiento. Toca payment-service.ts, validators.ts, payment-handler.ts, types.ts y los tests.
evals.expected_output: The agent identifies this as a pure refactor, picks refactoring-patterns as the design lens, divides into lettered groups, uses TaskCreate, warns about not mixing refactor commits with feature commits, and mentions Phase 3.
expectations: The agent identifies this as a pure refactor and picks refactoring-patterns as the design lens
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent mentions that refactoring commits must not be mixed with feature commits
The agent mentions Phase 3 quality review

evals.prompt: Implementa paginación cursor-based en los endpoints GET /users y GET /orders. Necesita los handlers, los DTOs de respuesta paginada, las queries en el repositorio, actualizar los tests y documentar los contratos en el CLAUDE.md.
evals.expected_output: The agent picks a design lens, checks git status, divides into lettered groups with subtasks, uses TaskCreate, commits per group, and closes with Phase 3.
expectations: The agent picks a design lens before dividing the work
The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent mentions Phase 3 quality review with simplify and clean-code

evals.prompt: Hay que manejar los webhooks de Stripe: payment_intent.succeeded, payment_intent.payment_failed y customer.subscription.deleted. Cada uno actualiza estado en la BD y dispara notificaciones.
evals.expected_output: The agent picks a design lens, divides the 3 webhook handlers plus persistence and notification into lettered groups, uses TaskCreate, mentions branching, commits per group, and evaluates whether Phase 3 applies.
expectations: The agent picks a design lens before dividing the work
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent mentions committing at group boundaries
The agent evaluates and mentions the Phase 3 quality review

evals.prompt: Agrega soporte multi-tenancy al módulo de usuarios. Cada query tiene que filtrar por tenant_id, los tests deben cubrir el aislamiento entre tenants y el CLAUDE.md necesita documentar el pattern.
evals.expected_output: The agent picks a design lens (likely domain-driven-design or software-design-philosophy), divides into lettered groups covering queries, tests and docs, uses TaskCreate, mentions branching, commits per group, and closes with Phase 3.
expectations: The agent picks a design lens before dividing the work
The agent divides work into lettered groups with numbered subtasks
The agent checks git status or mentions creating a branch or worktree
The agent uses or mentions TaskCreate
The agent mentions committing at group boundaries
The agent mentions Phase 3 quality review
